issues.comment: The expression `idp.getConfig().get(OrganizationModel.BROKER_PUBLIC)` calls get() on the result of getConfig() without checking if getConfig() returns null, causing a NullPointerException if the IDP has no configuration map.

The cached path returns IDPs from `session.identityProviders().getById(id)` directly, but the non-cached path applies `createOrganizationAwareIdentityProviderModel` mapping, causing inconsistent behavior where cached and non-cached results have different IDP wrapping.
The cleanup code tries to remove IDP with alias "alias" but the created IDP has alias "idp-alias-" + i, causing test cleanup to fail and leaving test data behind.
The cleanup code tries to remove IDP with alias "alias" but the created IDP has alias "idp-alias-20", causing test cleanup to fail and leaving test data behind.
